title: Li-In-S composite foil with built-in electric fields to stabilize Li/Li<sub>6</sub>PS<sub>5</sub>Cl interface for long-life all-solid-state batteries
abstract: Published online: 05 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-74049-1 Sulfide-based all-solid-state <mark>lithium</mark> batteries severely suffer from <mark>sulfide electrolyte</mark>/Li interfacial instability. Here, authors propose an In and S doping into Li metal to stabilize the Li/<mark>Li6PS5Cl</mark> interface by constructing built-in electric fields, thereby enabling long-life all-solid-state <mark>lithium</mark> batteries.
